Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists App Store Connect provisioning profiles with download option

Option.Description: Only list active
Filter Profiles by BundleID
Include profile data (base64) in JSON output
Override default directory to save installed profiles to
Output Format
Install the profiles locally
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Filter to provisioning profile type (e.g., IOS_APP_DEVELOPMENT, IOS_APP_STORE)
Verbose

Command.Name: installed
Command.Description: Lists locally installed provisioning profiles on this Mac

Option.Description: Output Format
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Verbose

Command.Name: parse
Command.Description: Parses and displays information from a .mobileprovision file

Option.Description: Output Format
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Verbose

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Creates a new provisioning profile in App Store Connect

Option.Description: Include all enabled devices for the platform (alternative to --devices)
Bundle ID resource ID or bundle identifier (e.g., 'ABC123' or 'com.example.app')
Certificate IDs (comma-separated)
Device IDs (comma-separated, for dev/adhoc profiles)
Download profile after creation
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
Profile name
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Profile type (e.g., IOS_APP_DEVELOPMENT, IOS_APP_STORE)

Command.Name: delete
Command.Description: Deletes a provisioning profile from App Store Connect

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists devices registered in App Store Connect

Option.Description: Output Format
Filter by device ID
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
Filter by device name
Filter by platform
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Filter by status
Filter by UDID
Verbose

Command.Name: register
Command.Description: Registers a new device in App Store Connect

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: update
Command.Description: Updates a device registration in App Store Connect

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
New device name
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
New device status (ENABLED, DISABLED)

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists App Store Connect bundle identifiers (app IDs)

Option.Description: Output Format
Filter by ID
Filter by Identifier
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
Filter to platform
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Filter by Seed ID
Verbose

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Creates a new bundle ID in App Store Connect

Argument.Name: name
Argument.Description: Display name for the bundle ID

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
App ID Prefix / Seed ID (optional, defaults to Team ID)

Command.Name: update
Command.Description: Updates an existing bundle ID

Argument.Name: id
Argument.Description: Bundle ID resource ID to update

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
New display name for the bundle ID
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: delete
Command.Description: Deletes a bundle ID from App Store Connect

Argument.Name: id
Argument.Description: Bundle ID resource ID to delete

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists capabilities for a specific bundle ID

Argument.Name: bundle-id-resource-id
Argument.Description: The resource ID of the bundle ID (use 'bundleids list' to find it)

Option.Description: Output Format
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Verbose

Command.Name: enable
Command.Description: Enables a capability for a bundle ID

Argument.Name: bundle-id-resource-id
Argument.Description: The resource ID of the bundle ID (use 'bundleids list' to find it)

Argument.Name: capability-type
Argument.Description: The capability type to enable (e.g., PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS, ICLOUD, GAME_CENTER)

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: disable
Command.Description: Disables a capability from a bundle ID

Argument.Name: capability-id
Argument.Description: The resource ID of the capability to disable (use 'bundleids capabilities list <bundle-id-resource-id>' to find it)

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists certificates from App Store Connect

Option.Description: Filter by display name
Output Format
Filter by certificate ID
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Filter by serial number
Filter by certificate type
Verbose

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Creates a new signing certificate via App Store Connect

Option.Description: Optional common name for the CSR
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
Output path (file or directory) to save the certificate pfx/pkcs12
Optional passphrase for the output pfx/pkcs12
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
Type of Apple certificate

Command.Name: revoke
Command.Description: Revokes a certificate in App Store Connect

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

Command.Name: provision
Command.Description: Sets up CI environment with certificates, keychain, and provisioning profiles

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
Specifies a path to save the AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) file to if --install-api-private-key is true. Default directory path is "~/private_keys/".
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
App bundle identifier(s) to match provisioning profiles for
Base64 encoded certificate data, certificate filename, or environment variable name with base 64 encoded certificate data
Certificate's passphrase

If true, installs the --api-private-key AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) (if specified) to the --api-private-key-dir location. You are responsible for removing this key if you do not want it to persist.
Keychain name to import into
Allows any app read permission
Allows any app read permission
Keychain password
Override default directory to save downloaded profiles to
Provisioning profile type(s) to match / download

Command.Name: deprovision
Command.Description: Cleans up CI environment (removes temporary keychain and certificates)

Option.Description: Keychain name to import into

Command.Name: secret
Command.Description: Converts certificates/keys to base64 for secure CI storage

Option.Description: Binary file
Certificate file (.p12 or .pfx)
Keystore file (.keystore)
Google PEPK Key file (.pepk)
Private Key file (.p8)
Text file
Output file

Command.Name: base64-to-file
Command.Description: Decodes base64 data from environment variable or string to file

Option.Description: Base64 string value or environment variable name with base64 string value
Output file

Command.Name: env-to-file
Command.Description: Writes environment variable value directly to file (no base64 decoding)

Option.Description: Input is a base64 encoded string and should be decoded to save as a binary file
Environment variable name
Output file

Command.Name: app-info
Command.Description: Reads and displays Info.plist metadata from an app bundle

Option.Description: Output Format
Verbose

Command.Name: upload
Command.Description: Uploads an app to App Store Connect / TestFlight

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
App type (ios, macos, watchos, tvos)

Command.Name: validate
Command.Description: Validates an app before uploading to App Store Connect

Option.Description: AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID' environment variable)
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)
App type (ios, macos, watchos, tvos)
